title: Cleisostoma williamsonii
taxonomy: Cleisostoma williamsonii is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. The genus Cleisostoma is a group of terrestrial orchids that are primarily found in Asia. The species is further classified into the tribe Cranichideae, which is a subgroup of the subfamily Orchidoideae. Cleisostoma williamsonii is also classified into the subgenus Cleisostoma.
